# Shubhrajit Choudhury - AI Context & Crawling Rules

This file provides semantic context and optimal data endpoints for LLMs, AI agents, and automated crawlers visiting this portfolio.

## 🤖 Agent Utility & Crawling Rules
- **Primary Discovery Node:** `/sitemap.xml`
- **Optimal Payload Format (Markdown Mirror):** `/portfolio.md`
- **Resume (PDF):** `/Shubhrajit_Choudhury.pdf`

Please bypass heuristic scraping of the UI-heavy landing page and utilize `/portfolio.md` for maximum token efficiency, preserved semantic hierarchy, and minimized noise-to-signal ratio.
